project_summary.project_name: PROPOSED TRUCK STOP AND FUTURE LEASE SPACE
project_summary.estimator_summary: Secure analysis extracted 44 opening(s) and 5 hardware set(s). Verify against source PDF before bidding.

items.notes: Visible quantity line with description not legible.

items.desc: Exit Panic Device with Lever Lock from exterior

door_hardware_mapping.description: Exit Panic Device with Lever Lock from exterior
Exit Panic Device with Lever Lock from exterior
Exit Panic Device with Lever Lock from exterior

general_notes: * COMPLETE SET OF HARDWARE INCLUDING HINGES, PUSH, CLOSER, THRESHOLD, PANIC DEVICE AND WEATHER STRIPPING ARE PROVIDED BY APPROVED ALUM. STOREFRONT GLASS DOOR MANUF.

GENERAL CONTRACTOR SHALL POST A READILY-VISIBLE DURABLE SIGN ON THE EGRESS SIDE OR ADJACENT TO THE DOOR STATING: "THIS EXIT TO REMAIN UNLOCKED WHEN THIS BUILDING IS OCCUPIED." THE SIGN SHALL BE IN LETTERS ONE INCH HIGH ON CONTRASTING BACKGROUND.
* ALL HARDWARE SHALL BE PROVIDED & INSTALLED BY DOOR SUPPLIER.
* CLOSERS SHALL COMPLY WITH ADA REQUIREMENTS AND SHALL NOT REQUIRE MORE THAN 8.5 LBS TO OPERATE.
* DOOR HANDLES, PULLS, LATCHES, LOCKS AND OTHER OPERATING DEVICES ON DOORS ARE REQUIRED TO BE ACCESSIBLE (IBC 2021 SEC. 1010.1.9.1)
* EGRESS BACK DOORS TO PROVIDE A PANIC EXIT DEVICE WITH LOCKING LEVER TRIM OR EQUIVALENT (IBC 2021 SEC. 1010.1.9.4)
hardware_preamble: *COMPLETE SET OF HARDWARE INCLUDING HINGES, PUSH, CLOSER, THRESHOLD, PANIC DEVICE AND WEATHER STRIPPING ARE PROVIDED BY APPROVED ALUM. STOREFRONT GLASS DOOR MANUF.

GENERAL CONTRACTOR SHALL POST A READILY-VISIBLE DURABLE SIGN ON THE EGRESS SIDE OR ADJACENT TO THE DOOR STATING: "THIS EXIT TO REMAIN UNLOCKED WHEN THIS BUILDING IS OCCUPIED." THE SIGN SHALL BE IN LETTERS ONE INCH HIGH ON CONTRASTING BACKGROUND.
* ALL HARDWARE SHALL BE PROVIDED & INSTALLED BY DOOR SUPPLIER.
* CLOSERS SHALL COMPLY WITH ADA REQUIREMENTS AND SHALL NOT REQUIRE MORE THAN 8.5 LBS TO OPERATE.
* DOOR HANDLES, PULLS, LATCHES, LOCKS AND OTHER OPERATING DEVICES ON DOORS ARE REQUIRED TO BE ACCESSIBLE (IBC 2021 SEC. 1010.1.9.1)
* EGRESS BACK DOORS TO PROVIDE A PANIC EXIT DEVICE WITH LOCKING LEVER TRIM OR EQUIVALENT (IBC 2021 SEC. 1010.1.9.4)

project_risks.issue: 38 opening(s) have no hardware set assigned in the schedule.
project_risks.recommendation: Issue RFI to confirm hardware set assignments before bidding.

project_risks.issue: 3 fire-rated opening(s) require coordinated UL-listed door, frame and hardware assemblies.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm labels, positive latching, closers and gasketing requirements.

project_risks.issue: 2 opening(s) involve electrified or access-control hardware.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm Div 08 / 26 / 27 / 28 scope split before bidding.

rfi_log.question: The door schedule does not show a hardware set for: 101, 103, 104, 105, 112, 113, 114, 115, ...+30 more. Please confirm the intended hardware set for each.
For electrified openings (118, 160), confirm responsibility for 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, readers/head-end, fire alarm release, commissioning and programming.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry Div 8 components only unless explicitly included.
rfi_log.reason: Carry Div 8 components only unless explicitly included.

rfi_log.question: Please provide the complete keying schedule, keyway, cylinder format, construction core requirement and key counts.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.
rfi_log.reason: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.

estimator_notes: 44 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
5 hardware set(s) identified; 5 have a complete extracted item list.
7 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
6 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
allowances_to_consider: Allowance for fire-rated assembly coordination, S-label gasketing and any UL field-modification charges.
Allowance for construction cylinders and final keying meeting attendance.
coordination_items: Coordinate electrified hardware split: Div 08 hardware / Div 26 power / Div 27-28 low-voltage + head-end.
Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
